codeReview.summary: The implementation fully covers all expected behaviors for the 'preset add' CLI command. The code is well-structured, follows Go conventions, and properly integrates with the existing preset package infrastructure. All required flags are implemented (--query, --description, --connection, --param-def, --tags, --use), error handling is comprehensive with clear hints, and the JSON output format uses the envelope system correctly.

summary: PASS - The preset-cli-add feature is fully implemented and tested. The code review found no blocking or non-blocking issues. The implementation correctly handles all expected behaviors: (1) preset creation with timestamps, (2) automatic parameter detection, (3) parameter definition parsing, (4) tags array parsing, (5) active preset marking, (6) PRESET_EXISTS error with edit hint, (7) MISSING_REQUIRED_FIELD error, (8) INVALID_PARAM_DEF error, (9) structured JSON output. The test coverage is comprehensive with 15 test cases covering all validation assertions VAL-CLI-001 through VAL-CLI-005, plus additional tests for timestamp generation, tag parsing, empty name validation, and output format verification. The worker followed the preset-worker skill procedure correctly (TDD approach, envelope output format, error structure).
